description: Metadata catalog for the Online Retail ETL pipeline. Documents data sources, schemas, lineage, and quality metrics.

data_sources.name: UCI Online Retail Dataset
data_sources.description: Real UK e-commerce transactions from 2010-2011. Contains invoices, products, customers, and countries.

fields.name: StockCode
fields.notes: Product identifier — some non-product codes exist (POST, DOT)

fields.name: Description
fields.notes: ~1,454 nulls/empty — filled with NO DESCRIPTION sentinel

fields.name: Quantity
fields.notes: Negative values = returns — kept as valid business events

fields.name: InvoiceDate
fields.notes: String in source — cast to TIMESTAMP in transform

fields.name: UnitPrice
fields.notes: Values <= 0 filtered out as data errors

schemas.name: staging_online_retail
schemas.description: Raw landing zone — exact copy of source data with pipeline metadata appended. Schema initialised automatically by ingest.py on first run.

tables.name: raw_transactions_archive
tables.description: Daily snapshot for versioning and audit trail. Created and populated by snapshot_staging DAG task.
tables.load_strategy: DELETE today's snapshot + INSERT — idempotent on reruns

schemas.name: silver_online_retail
schemas.description: Cleaned intermediate layer with natural keys. Persisted to decouple transform from load — if load fails, re-run load from Silver without re-reading source.

tables.name: customers
tables.notes: Includes UNKNOWN sentinel row for anonymous transactions

tables.name: transactions
tables.notes: Cleaned facts with natural keys — no surrogate keys yet

schemas.name: dw_online_retail
schemas.description: Star schema data warehouse — surrogate keys, FK constraints, indexes. Optimized for analytics.

tables.name: dim_customers
tables.load_strategy: INSERT ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE — upsert
tables.notes: Includes UNKNOWN sentinel for anonymous transactions

tables.name: dim_products
tables.load_strategy: INSERT ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE — upsert
tables.notes: unit_price not stored here — captured on fact at time of sale

tables.name: dim_date
tables.load_strategy: INSERT ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING — date records are immutable
tables.notes: Human-readable integer key — naturally sortable without joins

tables.name: fact_sales
tables.grain: One row per invoice line (invoice_no + stock_code)
tables.load_strategy: Append with chunksize=1000 — bulk insert in batches
tables.notes: total_value pre-computed as quantity * unit_price. Surrogate keys resolved via left-join merge before insert.

lineage.description: End-to-end data flow — 5 Airflow tasks in sequence

steps.notes: Also initialises all schemas and tables via schema.sql on first run
Daily snapshot — idempotent via DELETE + INSERT pattern
Dedup, null handling, type casting, total_value derivation
Upserts dims, resolves surrogate keys via left-join merge, bulk inserts facts
Audits Bronze → Silver → Gold row counts. on_failure_callback fires structured alert on any task failure.

pipeline.failure_alerting: on_failure_callback — structured log with DAG, task, execution date, and log URL
pipeline.deployment: Local: Docker Compose | Production: AWS MWAA
